description_long: This is a modern, two-story house enclosed within a rectangular walled lot, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The front facade includes a double garage with a gray gate, large windows, and a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and additional greenery, providing ample outdoor living space. The house's exterior is predominantly white with some gray and beige accents, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The property includes paved driveways, walkways, and multiple entry points, with the main entrance set back behind the garden. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, double garage, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, all enclosed within a walled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry, landscaped garden, and large windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and additional greenery.
description_view_2: Opposite facade with more windows, a secondary entry, and a view of the pool and garden.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the driveway, parked cars, and a mix of trees and paved areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, no porch, flanked by landscaped garden and large windows, minimal decorative elements
